title: Security Group Enumeration: Rapid Group Membership Queries
description: Detects Event 4799 rapid security-enabled group membership enumeration — indicates BloodHound, SharpHound, or net group /domain reconnaissance. Normal users query 1-2 groups; attackers enumerate all groups systematically.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' and 'Event ID' = '4799' | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectUserName:([^;]+)'), Process = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'CallerProcessName:([^;]+)') | stats count as Queries by Account, Process, Entity | where Queries > 50 | sort -Queries
